message.content:
import { Map, Swords, Trophy, Target, Shield, Sparkles } from 'lucide-react'
import { Callout } from '@/components/mdx/Callout'
import { Card, CardGrid } from '@/components/mdx/CardGrid'
import { Checklist } from '@/components/mdx/Checklist'
import { FAQ } from '@/components/mdx/FAQ'
import { Steps, Step } from '@/components/mdx/Steps'
import { Section } from '@/components/mdx/Section'
import { YouTubeEmbed } from '@/components/mdx/YouTubeEmbed'

export const metadata = {
  title: "Bizarre Lineage Jotaro Raid: Complete Cheese Guide & Location 2026",
  description: "Master the Bizarre Lineage Jotaro raid with our 2026 guide. Learn the Anubis cheese method, Chumbo NPC location, and how to farm SSS rank rewards easily.",
  category: "Guide",
  image: "https://placehold.co/800x400/1e293b/fff?text=Jotaro+Raid+Guide",
  date: "2026-03-04",
  author: "Bizarre Lineage Wiki Team"
}

<Callout type="info" title="Quick Guide">
- **Bizarre Lineage Jotaro Raid**: High-tier instance essential for Maiden Heaven progression.
- **NPC Location**: Talk to Chumbo at the side entrance of Jojo's Bizarre Gym (Bus Stop 2).
- **Meta Strategy**: Use the **Anubis Cheese** method to secure SSS rank consistently.
- **Required Team**: Best performed as a duo with both players using the Anubis stand.
- **Top Rewards**: SSS rank grants Lucky Arrows, Ether, and massive EXP for leveling.
</Callout>

In the evolving landscape of Morioh Cho, mastering the **bizarre lineage jotaro raid** has become a mandatory milestone for any player aiming for top-tier stands like Maiden Heaven. This raid is not just a test of brute force but a tactical encounter that rewards precision and specific builds. Whether you are a solo player looking to optimize your farm or part of a duo seeking the fastest clear times, understanding the mechanics of this instance is vital. In this guide, we will break down the exact location of the raid NPC, the specific stand requirements for the most effective "cheese" methods, and how to navigate the rewards system. The **bizarre lineage jotaro raid** offers some of the best loot in the game, including the elusive Lucky Arrow, making it a cornerstone of the 2026 meta.

<Section icon={Map} title="Finding Chumbo: Jotaro Raid NPC Location">

Locating the entrance to the raid is the first hurdle for many new players. Unlike the main story NPCs who stand prominently in the open, the raid initiator for Jotaro is tucked away. You must head to the bustling area of Bus Stop 2, which serves as a central hub for many early to mid-game activities.

**Video Highlights:**
- Visual walkthrough from Bus Stop 2 to the Gym.
- Identifying the difference between the Quest Jotaro and the Raid NPC.
- Demonstrating the specific corner used for the Anubis cheese strategy.

<YouTubeEmbed videoId="7nhAMLXF2eM" title="Best Way to Farm Jotaro Raid" />

The NPC you are looking for is named **Chumbo**. While the main Jotaro Kujo NPC (used for storyline quests) stands directly in front of Jojo's Bizarre Gym, Chumbo is located at the **side entrance**. Following the road from the bus stop and turning left toward the gym's perimeter will lead you straight to him.

| NPC Name | Purpose | Exact Location | Nearby Landmark |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Chumbo** | Start Jotaro Raid / Raid Shop | Side entrance of Gym | Jojo's Bizarre Gym |
| **Jotaro Kujo** | Main Storyline Quests | Front entrance of Gym | Bus Stop 2 |
| **Shozuki** | Side Quest (The Fool I) | Fence near Gym | Bus Stop 2 |
| **Boxing Coach** | Teach Boxing Style | Top floor of Gym | Jojo's Bizarre Gym |

<Callout type="warning" title="NPC Confusion">
Do not confuse Chumbo with the main Jotaro Kujo NPC. Talking to the main Jotaro will only progress your story quests and will not allow you to enter the raid instance. Always look for the side entrance to find Chumbo.
</Callout>

</Section>

<Section icon={Swords} title="The Anubis Cheese: Strategy and Mechanics">

The most effective way to handle the **bizarre lineage jotaro raid** in the current 2026 meta is the "Anubis Cheese." This method relies on the high attack speed and stun-lock potential of the Anubis stand. While Jotaro Kujo is a formidable boss with high health and devastating Star Platinum attacks, he is vulnerable to being cornered and overwhelmed by rapid M1 attacks.

To execute this perfectly, it is highly recommended to bring a friend. A duo of Anubis users can effectively keep Jotaro in a permanent hit-stun state, preventing him from activating his "Time Stop" or heavy-hitting finishers.

<Steps>
  <Step num="1" title="Build Preparation">
    Both players should equip the **Anubis stand**. Ensure your skill points are invested in M1 speed and damage to maximize the stun-lock duration.
  </Step>
  <Step num="2" title="Engagement">
    Once inside the raid instance, one player should draw Jotaro's aggro and lead him toward a corner of the arena. The corners near the entrance or the back pillars are ideal.
  </Step>
  <Step num="3" title="Cornering the Boss">
    Force Jotaro into the corner. Once his back is against the wall, both players must begin spamming M1 attacks and abilities simultaneously.
  </Step>
  <Step num="4" title="The Stun-Lock Loop">
    Maintain a rhythm. Do not let up on the attacks. If timed correctly, Jotaro will be unable to move or counter-attack until his health bar is depleted.
  </Step>
</Steps>

<Callout type="tip" title="Solo Capability">
While a duo is faster (averaging 3 minutes per run), it is possible to solo this raid with Anubis if your timing is perfect. However, the risk of Jotaro breaking the stun-lock is much higher when solo.
</Callout>

| Strategy Component | Recommendation | Reason |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Primary Stand** | **Anubis** | High M1 speed and reliable hit-stun |
| **Team Size** | **2 Players (Duo)** | Ensures 100% stun-lock uptime |
| **Average Time** | **3-4 Minutes** | Efficiency for farming Lucky Arrows |
| **Target Rank** | **SSS** | Maximum rewards and Ether drops |

</Section>

<Section icon={Trophy} title="Rewards, Rankings, and Progression">

Completing the **bizarre lineage jotaro raid** isn't just about winning; it's about the rank you achieve. The game uses a letter-grade system (D to SSS) to determine the quality and quantity of loot you receive at the end of the instance. Achieving an SSS rank is the primary goal for anyone serious about the "Journey to Heaven" questline.

The rewards from this raid are essential for evolving stands. For instance, obtaining **Ether** is a key requirement for reaching Maiden Heaven (MIH). Additionally, the Jotaro raid is one of the most consistent ways to farm **Lucky Arrows**, which are used to roll for rare stands with better stats.

<CardGrid cols={3}>
  <Card title="Lucky Arrows">
    - **High Drop Rate** at SSS rank
    - Used for rolling rare stands
    - Essential for end-game builds
  </Card>
  <Card title="Ether">
    - Required for **Maiden Heaven**
    - Rare drop from high-rank clears
    - High trade value in the community
  </Card>
  <Card title="EXP & Chests">
    - Massive character experience
    - Rare crafting materials
    - Guaranteed loot boxes
  </Card>
</CardGrid>

<Callout type="success" title="SSS Rank Requirement">
To secure an SSS rank, you must deal consistent damage without taking significant hits. The Anubis cheese method is perfect for this because it prevents Jotaro from dealing any damage back to you, guaranteeing a high technical score.
</Callout>

| Reward Item | Drop Likelihood (SSS) | Primary Use |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Lucky Arrow** | **High** | Rolling for Legendary Stands |
| **Ether** | **Medium** | Evolution to C-Moon/MIH |
| **Legendary Chest** | **Low** | Rare Accessories and Items |
| **Stand Arrow** | **Guaranteed** | Basic Stand rolling |

</Section>

<Section icon={Target} title="Preparation Checklist for Farmers">

Before you dive into the raid, you need to ensure your character is properly prepared. Entering the raid under-leveled or without the correct fighting style can lead to a quick defeat, especially if Jotaro manages to land a "Star Finger" or "Beatdown" move.

<Checklist
  id="jotaro-raid-prep"
  title="Raid Readiness Checklist:"
  items={[
    "Obtain the Anubis Stand from a standard arrow roll",
    "Reach at least Level 30 for baseline survivability",
    "Find a reliable partner (Duo is highly recommended)",
    "Set your spawn point at Bus Stop 2 for quick restarts",
    "Clear inventory space for multiple chest drops"
  ]}
/>

<Callout type="info" title="Fighting Style Synergy">
While the stand is the main focus, having a fighting style like **Boxing** (from the Gym Coach) provides extra health and durability, which acts as a safety net if the cheese method fails.
</Callout>

</Section>

<Section icon={Sparkles} title="Advanced Tips and Community Secrets">

As of March 2026, the community has discovered several nuances that can make your farming runs even more efficient. For example, some players prefer to use the **Kendo** fighting style (learned from the Samurai Master in Kame Yu Market) alongside Anubis for a slight damage boost to sword-based attacks.

Furthermore, keep an eye on the **Raid Shop** managed by Chumbo. The points you earn from completing the Jotaro raid can be spent here on specific evolution items, saving you the trouble of relying purely on RNG drops.

| Shop Item | Point Cost | Value Rating |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Evolution Manual** | **500 Points** | Essential (5/5) |
| **Rare Chest** | **200 Points** | Good (3/5) |
| **Lucky Arrow Fragment** | **1000 Points** | Excellent (5/5) |
| **EXP Potion** | **150 Points** | Moderate (2/5) |

<Callout type="tip" title="Server Hopping">
If you find that the raid instance is glitchy or the NPC isn't responding, try server hopping. High-traffic servers can sometimes lag, which might break the hit-stun timing required for the Anubis cheese.
</Callout>

</Section>

<Section icon={Shield} title="Bizarre Lineage Jotaro Raid FAQ">

<FAQ items={[
  {
    question: "Where exactly is the Jotaro Raid NPC located?",
    answer: "The NPC, Chumbo, is located at the side entrance of Jojo's Bizarre Gym near Bus Stop 2. Do not go to the main entrance where the quest-giver Jotaro stands."
  },
  {
    question: "Can I solo the Jotaro raid in Bizarre Lineage?",
    answer: "Yes, it is possible with the Anubis stand cheese. However, it is much safer and faster to do it as a duo to ensure the boss stays permanently stun-locked."
  },
  {
    question: "What is the best stand for the Jotaro raid?",
    answer: "Anubis is currently the meta choice for this raid due to its incredibly fast M1 attacks which can trap Jotaro in a corner and prevent him from attacking."
  },
  {
    question: "How do I get an SSS rank in the raid?",
    answer: "To get SSS, you need to finish the raid quickly while taking minimal damage. The Anubis cheese method is the most reliable way to achieve this rank consistently."
  }
]} />

<Callout type="info" title="Final Note">
Always check the latest patch notes on the official Discord or Trello. Developers frequently tweak boss AI, and while the Anubis cheese is effective now in 2026, future updates might require adjustments to your strategy.
</Callout>

</Section>
